gigabyte h610m k ddr4.name: GIGABYTE H610M K DDR4
gigabyte h610m k ddr4.compatibility: Intel 12th/13th/14th Gen Core processors. Best for non-overclockable i3/i5 CPUs.

msi b450m-a pro max ii.name: MSI B450M-A PRO MAX II
msi b450m-a pro max ii.compatibility: AMD Ryzen 1000/2000/3000/5000 series. Requires a BIOS update for Ryzen 5000 series.

msi pro h610m s ddr4.name: MSI Pro H610M S DDR4
msi pro h610m s ddr4.compatibility: Intel 12th/13th/14th Gen Core processors. Entry-level budget board.

ramsta rs-b450mp.name: RAMSTA RS-B450MP
ramsta rs-b450mp.compatibility: Budget board for AM4 CPUs. Often lacks advanced VRM cooling for high-end Ryzen 7/9.

asus prime b650-plus.name: ASUS PRIME B650-PLUS
asus prime b650-plus.compatibility: AMD Ryzen 7000 series and future AM5 CPUs. Supports faster DDR5 RAM and PCIe 5.0.

asus tuf gaming b550-plus.name: ASUS TUF GAMING B550-PLUS
asus tuf gaming b550-plus.compatibility: AMD Ryzen 3000/5000 series. Excellent value board with good VRMs for Ryzen 7/9.

msi pro x670-p wifi.name: MSI PRO X670-P WIFI
msi pro x670-p wifi.compatibility: High-end board for AMD Ryzen 7000 series. Ideal for overclocking and multiple high-speed NVMe drives.

msi mpg z790 carbon wifi.name: MSI MPG Z790 CARBON WIFI
msi mpg z790 carbon wifi.features: 5x M.2 (PCIe 4.0), 6x SATA 6Gb/s, Wi-Fi 6E, 2.5G LAN, robust VRM
msi mpg z790 carbon wifi.compatibility: High-end board for Intel 13th/14th Gen K-series CPUs. Essential for maximizing CPU overclocking potential.
